prompt: Enhance the 3D appearance of the fetus in the ultrasound by using the reference synthetic depth map to adjust shading and contour continuity.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (an ultrasound image of a fetus) to enhance the 3D appearance of the fetus. Use image 2 (a synthetic depth map) as a reference to guide the adjustments to shading and contour continuity. Specifically, modify the shading within the fetus in image 1 to depict a stronger sense of depth and volume, ensuring that all contours of the fetus appear smooth and continuous, consistent with the spatial information provided by the grayscale values in image 2.
objects: Shading within the fetus depicting depth and volume
Smooth and continuous contours of the fetus
